creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
While digging through why the Jenkins build test count had decreased so dramatically (see https://jenkins.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD_HEAD/186/testReport/ ), I rm -Rf'ed /usr/tests, ran make installworld, and noted that Kyuafile isn't being properly installed now in many subdirectories. I've included a sample from .../bin below.

This used to work a few weeks ago I think... I don't know when exactly it broke.

$ svnversion /usr/src
298720
$ svn info /usr/src/ | grep ^URL:
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/base/head
$ find /usr/tests/bin/
/usr/tests/bin/
/usr/tests/bin/chown
/usr/tests/bin/chown/chown-f_test
/usr/tests/bin/mv
/usr/tests/bin/mv/legacy_test
/usr/tests/bin/sleep
